claims.evidence_text: herbicide dose of “mesosulfuron methyl + iodosulfuron methyl sodium + diflufenican + mefenpyr-diethyl” Branded (Othello OD) in 6 doses of 0, 0.32, 0.64, 0.96, 1.28 and 1.6 L/ha (recommended dose 1.6 L/ha)
claims.claim_summary: Wheat weeds Sinapis arvensis and Avena were controlled with the herbicide Othello OD (mesosulfuron-methyl + iodosulfuron-methyl-sodium + diflufenican + mefenpyr-diethyl) at a recommended dose of 1.6 L/ha.

claims.evidence_text: the dosage required for reducing the weed biomass to less than 150 g/m 2 with consuming of 0, 45, 90, 180, 250 and 330 kg/ha of urea fertilizer was predicted to be 0.64, 1.04, 1.12, 0.96, 0.88, and 0.80L/ha of herbicide, respectively
claims.claim_summary: In wheat, the Othello OD herbicide dose needed to reduce weed biomass below 150 g/m2 varied with urea fertilizer level (0.64 to 1.12 L/ha across 0-330 kg/ha urea).
